params.name: Garns Number Place
params.description:
On Feb 12, 1880 AD, retired architect Garns invented this number-filling puzzle before it was named Sudoku and became popular worldwide.
As the predecessor of Sudoku, the number-filling puzzle of Latin squares was invented by Euler and other mathematicians in the early 18th century. After nearly a century of evolution, the game was eventually brought to Japan by a scholar and renamed Sudoku, becoming a classic puzzle game.
